title: AAP In Full Panic? Sisodia Rushes To Meet Kejriwal After Raghav Chadha Leads Mega AAP Exodus
description: After two-thirds of AAP's Rajya Sabha MPs joined the BJP, the party is strategizing its next steps. Manish Sisodia met Arvind Kejriwal post a Gujarat campaign to discuss the split's repercussions and future plans.
